cues.subtitle: The elevator display skips from 3 to 4, then goes dark.
cues.spoken_text: The elevator display skips from three to four, then goes dark.

cues.subtitle: A fuse rattles somewhere beyond the dead emergency lights.
cues.spoken_text: A fuse rattles somewhere beyond the dead emergency lights.

cues.subtitle: At the far end, a silhouette steps behind a door that never opened.
cues.spoken_text: At the far end, a silhouette steps behind a door that never opened.

cues.subtitle: The room numbers repeat in the wrong order.
cues.spoken_text: The room numbers repeat in the wrong order.

cues.subtitle: Your footsteps return one beat late.
cues.spoken_text: Your footsteps return one beat late.

cues.subtitle: A family photograph waits where the corridor should end.
cues.spoken_text: A family photograph waits where the corridor should end.

cues.subtitle: Room 407 is longer inside than the building is wide.
cues.spoken_text: Room four oh seven is longer inside than the building is wide.

cues.subtitle: The wallpaper carries the height marks of a missing child.
cues.spoken_text: The wallpaper carries the height marks of a missing child.

cues.subtitle: A family recording clicks on by itself.
cues.spoken_text: A family recording clicks on by itself.

cues.subtitle: YOUR VOICE: Zero. Zero. Zero. Seven.
cues.spoken_text: Zero. Zero. Zero. Seven.

cues.subtitle: YOUR VOICE: I left the rabbit under the bed.
cues.spoken_text: I left the rabbit under the bed.

cues.subtitle: YOUR VOICE: I locked the door from the outside.
cues.spoken_text: I locked the door from the outside.

cues.subtitle: The radio clicks off. Room 407 unlocks.
cues.spoken_text: The radio clicks off. Room four oh seven unlocks.

cues.subtitle: The note is written in your childhood handwriting.
cues.spoken_text: The note is written in your childhood handwriting.

cues.subtitle: Behind you, the family recording starts again.
cues.spoken_text: Behind you, the family recording starts again.

cues.subtitle: The corridor stretches toward a red EXIT light.
cues.spoken_text: The corridor stretches toward a red exit light.

cues.subtitle: Something stands between you and the room you forgot.
cues.spoken_text: Something stands between you and the room you forgot.

cues.subtitle: MANAGER: You are covering the last shift, yes?
cues.spoken_text: You are covering the last shift, yes?

cues.subtitle: MANAGER: Sign the log. Take the fourth-floor key.
cues.spoken_text: Sign the log. Take the fourth-floor key.

cues.subtitle: MANAGER: The lights failed outside Room 407.
cues.spoken_text: The lights failed outside Room four oh seven.

cues.subtitle: MANAGER: If someone calls from inside... do not answer twice.
cues.spoken_text: If someone calls from inside... do not answer twice.

cues.subtitle: The fuse catches. One light wakes up.
cues.spoken_text: The fuse catches. One light wakes up.

cues.subtitle: A second light answers farther down the hall.
cues.spoken_text: A second light answers farther down the hall.

cues.subtitle: A door slams where there was no door.
cues.spoken_text: A door slams where there was no door.

cues.subtitle: The emergency circuit settles into a low hum.
cues.spoken_text: The emergency circuit settles into a low hum.

cues.subtitle: The photograph shows you outside Room 407, holding the red rabbit.
cues.spoken_text: The photograph shows you outside Room four oh seven, holding the red rabbit.

cues.subtitle: Behind the family, the lobby clock is frozen at 00:07.
cues.spoken_text: Behind the family, the lobby clock is frozen at twelve oh seven.

cues.subtitle: The cassette contains your voice asking to be let out.
cues.spoken_text: The cassette contains your voice asking to be let out.

cues.subtitle: A second voice whispers: the radio remembers the stopped clock.
cues.spoken_text: The radio remembers the stopped clock.

cues.subtitle: The rabbit's stitched name is yours.
cues.spoken_text: The rabbit's stitched name is yours.

cues.subtitle: The corridor was not hunting the missing child. It was bringing you home.
cues.spoken_text: The corridor was not hunting the missing child. It was bringing you home.

cues.subtitle: RECORDING: You promised you would come back for us.
cues.spoken_text: You promised you would come back for us.

cues.subtitle: CHILD: I put the rabbit where the hallway cannot see.
cues.spoken_text: I put the rabbit where the hallway cannot see.

cues.subtitle: RECORDING: The door was locked from the outside.
cues.spoken_text: The door was locked from the outside.

cues.subtitle: The lobby clock is still running, but its second hand never moves.
cues.spoken_text: The lobby clock is still running, but its second hand never moves.

cues.subtitle: The display freezes at 00:07 whenever you look away.
cues.spoken_text: The display freezes at twelve oh seven whenever you look away.

cues.subtitle: Someone has circled the same time in every night log.
cues.spoken_text: Someone has circled the same time in every night log.

cues.subtitle: In the cracked glass, the elevator doors are standing open behind you.
cues.spoken_text: In the cracked glass, the elevator doors are standing open behind you.

cues.subtitle: The register lists every night worker except the shift dated tonight.
cues.spoken_text: The register lists every night worker except the shift dated tonight.

cues.subtitle: A fresh signature has been added beneath the old manager's name.
cues.spoken_text: A fresh signature has been added beneath the old manager's name.

cues.subtitle: The ink is still wet, although the pen has no ink cartridge.
cues.spoken_text: The ink is still wet, although the pen has no ink cartridge.

cues.subtitle: The final entry says: DO NOT LET THE CHILD ANSWER THE PHONE.
cues.spoken_text: The final entry says: Do not let the child answer the phone.

cues.subtitle: MAINTENANCE NOTICE: FLOOR 4 CLOSED AFTER THE 2007 INCIDENT.
cues.spoken_text: Maintenance notice. Floor four closed after the two thousand seven incident.

cues.subtitle: The notice has been signed by a manager who stopped working here years ago.
cues.spoken_text: The notice has been signed by a manager who stopped working here years ago.

cues.subtitle: A hand-written arrow points toward the spare fuse locker.
cues.spoken_text: A hand-written arrow points toward the spare fuse locker.

cues.subtitle: Below it, a smaller note reads: THE POWER NEVER FAILED.
cues.spoken_text: Below it, a smaller note reads: The power never failed.

cues.subtitle: Dust covers the bed, except for one clean hollow in the blankets.
cues.spoken_text: Dust covers the bed, except for one clean hollow in the blankets.

cues.subtitle: A child's voice under the frame whispers your name once.
cues.spoken_text: Your name.

cues.subtitle: The red rabbit was never hidden here. It was waiting somewhere you could see it.
cues.spoken_text: The red rabbit was never hidden here. It was waiting somewhere you could see it.

cues.subtitle: Your own initials are carved into the underside of the frame.
cues.spoken_text: Your own initials are carved into the underside of the frame.

cues.subtitle: The wardrobe is deeper than its back panel should allow.
cues.spoken_text: The wardrobe is deeper than its back panel should allow.

cues.subtitle: Scratches on the inside spell the same four digits as the radio clue.
cues.spoken_text: Scratches on the inside spell the same four digits as the radio clue.

cues.subtitle: When the door closes, the corridor outside sounds like a bedroom.
cues.spoken_text: When the door closes, the corridor outside sounds like a bedroom.

cues.subtitle: A coat in your childhood size is still warm at the shoulders.
cues.spoken_text: A coat in your childhood size is still warm at the shoulders.

cues.subtitle: Four plates are set, but only one has dust disturbed around it.
cues.spoken_text: Four plates are set, but only one has dust disturbed around it.

cues.subtitle: The family photograph on the table has been turned face down.
cues.spoken_text: The family photograph on the table has been turned face down.

cues.subtitle: Under the frame, someone has written: WE WERE WAITING FOR YOU.
cues.spoken_text: Under the frame, someone has written: We were waiting for you.

cues.subtitle: The empty chair turns a few degrees when you stop reading.
cues.spoken_text: The empty chair turns a few degrees when you stop reading.

cues.subtitle: The wallpaper is damp where the photograph used to hang.
cues.spoken_text: The wallpaper is damp where the photograph used to hang.

cues.subtitle: A child's height marks stop at 00:07.
cues.spoken_text: A child's height marks stop at twelve oh seven.

cues.subtitle: The next door opens only when you stop looking at it.
cues.spoken_text: The next door opens only when you stop looking at it.

cues.subtitle: Something small runs across the ceiling above the impossible corner.
cues.spoken_text: Something small runs across the ceiling above the impossible corner.

cues.subtitle: The cassette hiss is coming from inside the wall.
cues.spoken_text: The cassette hiss is coming from inside the wall.

cues.subtitle: Your voice counts footsteps that have not happened yet.
cues.spoken_text: One. Two. Three. Four.

cues.subtitle: The impossible corner is waiting beyond the red room number.
cues.spoken_text: The impossible corner is waiting beyond the red room number.

cues.subtitle: The counting stops only when a second pair of footsteps begins.
cues.spoken_text: The counting stops only when a second pair of footsteps begins.

cues.subtitle: The rabbit's stitched mouth is full of fresh dust.
cues.spoken_text: The rabbit's stitched mouth is full of fresh dust.

cues.subtitle: A second set of footprints ends at the corner and turns back.
cues.spoken_text: A second set of footprints ends at the corner and turns back.

cues.subtitle: The hallway has finished remembering. The radio is awake.
cues.spoken_text: The hallway has finished remembering. The radio is awake.

cues.subtitle: Behind the static, a child is asking why you left the door locked.
cues.spoken_text: Why did you leave the door locked?

cues.subtitle: The condemnation notice is dated October 2007, sixteen years before tonight.
cues.spoken_text: The condemnation notice is dated October two thousand seven, sixteen years before tonight.

cues.subtitle: Room 407 is named as the origin of a fire the hotel never reported.
cues.spoken_text: Room four oh seven is named as the origin of a fire the hotel never reported.

cues.subtitle: Your childhood signature appears beneath one line: only survivor.
cues.spoken_text: Your childhood signature appears beneath one line: only survivor.

cues.subtitle: The night roster lists no manager, no guard, and no scheduled shift.
cues.spoken_text: The night roster lists no manager, no guard, and no scheduled shift.

cues.subtitle: Every voice you heard belongs to the Room 407 casualty list.
cues.spoken_text: Every voice you heard belongs to the Room four oh seven casualty list.

cues.subtitle: Your name is crossed out. Beside it, the clock reads 23:47.
cues.spoken_text: Your name is crossed out. Beside it, the clock reads twenty-three forty-seven.
